creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> But when I look at the
> Pine64+ 2GB I see a /usr/lib/libarchive.so.6

Correct, /usr/lib/libarchive.so.6 will exist on systems originally built from pre-ino64 sources. After ino64 libarchive is installed as /usr/lib/libarchive.so.7. The old one will continue to exist until "make delete-old-libs" is run. You should be able to use existing packages with the existing libraries.
